lineage.method: SP-E + SP-G bundle: same v6 score (lsk3 + F-cascade w=0.025) at h10d as v6_lsk3_g_v2_h10d, swap regime-gating overlay v2 -> v3. v3 = v2 components × DVOL range z90 throttle (BTC + ETH). SP-E correlation regime gate (doc §E.17) DROPPED — empirically falsified per threshold_provenance.md SP-E section.

v2_components: F55 BTC vol regime quantile throttle
overlay_v3_construction.v3_droppped: SP-E btc_eth_realized_corr_30d gate (tertile-stratified IC ratio bottom/top = 0.93 / 0.90 at h5d/h10d, REVERSED vs doc §E.17 prediction of >=1.20)

throttle_frequency_2026_04_29.interpretation: v3 throttles harder than v2 on ~4.7% of days (DVOL anomaly days). Calm days unchanged.

sp_e_e17_falsification_2026_04_30.test: lsk3 score per-timestamp rank IC, partitioned by btc_eth_corr_30d regime, tertile split for statistical power

tertile_split_h10d.result: FAIL — high-corr regime has HIGHER IC than low-corr (sign reversed vs doc prediction)

thesis_profile.market_mechanism: SP-E + SP-G bundle: identical v6 score (lsk3 + F-cascade w=0.025) at h10d, but with regime-gating overlay upgraded from v2 to v3. v3 adds DVOL range z90 throttle (SP-G G2 component, doc-untested) on top of v2's 5 components. SP-E correlation regime gate was DROPPED — empirically falsified per tertile-stratified IC analysis (high-corr regime has HIGHER IC, sign-reversed vs doc §E.17 prediction).
thesis_profile.directional_claim: Same long-short top-3 perp construction as v6_lsk3_g_v2_h10d. Identical score function. Position size multiplied by W3.5 v3 regime-gating overlay = v2 multiplier × DVOL range z90 throttle (BTC + ETH). Throttles harder on ~4.7% of days when implied vol-of-vol enters its top quantile. Falsified if (a) walk_forward median sharpe drops below v6_lsk3_g_v2_h10d (+2.832) by more than 0.2 without compensating regime improvement; OR (b) regime_holdout fails (worst regime below -2.828 OR positive_regime_fraction below 1/3).
thesis_profile.factor_formula: raw = -0.20*z(iv_smooth_60) -0.10*z(rv_5) +0.18*z(dh_60) +0.15*z(dh_5) -0.07*z(tt_smooth_5) -0.10*z(liquidity_stress_qv_iv) -0.06*z(momentum_decay_5_20) +0.05*z(taker_imb_dispersion) -0.05*z(quality_funding_oi) +0.10*z(downside_upside_vol_ratio_30) +0.07*z(funding_basis_residual_implied_repo_30) +0.025*z(liq_cascade_recency_score_5d); final_score = tanh((percentile_rank(raw)-0.5)*1.80); target_weight_per_name = (long_leverage/top_K - short_leverage/bottom_K) * regime_gating_v3_multiplier(t)

experimental_reason: SP-G overlay enrichment test: v6_h10d under v3 (DVOL extensions) vs v2 baseline. Pending cycle outcome decision; if v3 walk_forward median >= v2 +2.832 with regime preserved, promote to active_alternative.
